questions:
Q1: What are the synonyms of "Determined"?
A. upset
B. Resolute, firm
C. outraged

Q2: What are the antonyms of "Determined"?
A. lazy
B. Calm
C. Weak, uncertain

Q3: What are the synonyms of "Confident"?
A. inspired
B. inspired
C. Self-assured, bold

Q4: What are the antonyms of "Disappointed"?
A. certain
B. indifferent
C. Satisfied, pleased
Q5: Fill in the blank: "He is determined to succeed."
